outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR 1.48-3.21 across all expiries. Strong RESONANCE support at 6400-6500 zone. Max Pain magnet at 6550 creates downward drift pressure. Spot trapped between 6600 friction zone and 6700 resistance. Monthly negative GEX signals volatility risk if support breaks.

levels.motivazione: Massive put OI across ALL 3 expirations (7271+8546+24251). Ultimate structural support where MM must defend. Highest concentration of bearish positioning = strongest support.
Significant put OI in all 3 expirations (5149+4867+20997). Secondary structural support confluence with high Volume/OI ratio in 0DTE (5.15x).
0DTE Max Pain at 6550, near Weekly Max Pain 6575. MM target zone where option value is minimized. Price attraction force active below spot.
Heavy mixed positioning across all expirations. High call OI (8945+4020+13770) and put OI (4997+3887+20920). Near-spot friction zone with intense volume.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point where cumulative GEX changes sign. Critical pivot determining intraday directional bias. Below this = dealers short gamma = volatility.
0DTE dominant call OI (8990) with high volume (13499). Primary intraday resistance. Weekly also shows significant call interest (6189 OI).
